title: lathyrus cyaneus
intro: Lathyrus cyaneus, also known as the blue vetchling, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its anthelmintic and astringent properties. The health benefits of Lathyrus cyaneus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus cyaneus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions when used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
